body.en: Leads implementation, receives reports, coordinates communications, and supervises the overall effort.
body.es: Leads implementation, receives reports, coordinates communications, and supervises the overall effort.

body.en: Single point person for communicating damages, urgent needs, and updates with Emergency Services.
body.es: Single point person for communicating damages, urgent needs, and updates with Emergency Services.

body.en: Monitors the Emergency Alert System or NOAA Weather Radio and relays pertinent information to the group.
body.es: Monitors the Emergency Alert System or NOAA Weather Radio and relays pertinent information to the group.

body.en: Checks households with HELP signs or no signs, checks elderly or special-needs neighbors, assists if appropriate, and reports back to the gathering site.
body.es: Checks households with HELP signs or no signs, checks elderly or special-needs neighbors, assists if appropriate, and reports back to the gathering site.
